Number of pretraining documents and finetuning pairs to generate are parameters of the run.
The count of pretraining texts and of prompt/response pairs are explicit knobs, allowing small smoke runs and large training runs from the same configuration.

The user requested that the number of input texts be a parameter. Both the pretraining document count and the supervised pair count are configurable, with small values for plumbing validation and large values for real training. Generation over-produces to compensate for documents dropped by the filter and deduplication.
